# kIOHIDValueScaleTypeExponent

**Enumeration Case**

An option to scale the value with respect to the element’s unit exponent.

## Declaration

```swift
kIOHIDValueScaleTypeExponent
```

## Getting the Options

- **kIOHIDValueScaleTypeCalibrated**: An option to scale the value with respect to a set of calibration properties.
- **kIOHIDValueScaleTypePhysical**: An option to scale the value with respect to the physical minimum and maximum values.
